AlertDefinition.n: APC UPS - High Output Load Warning
AlertDefinition.Description: Alerts when APC UPS output load exceeds 80%. Monitors APC Output Load OID 1.3.6.1.4.1.318.1.1.1.4.2.3.0. Value is percentage 0-100. Resets at 70% to avoid alert flapping.

Parameter.Value: RESOLVED: UPS Load Returned to Normal - ${NodeName}
